heading: Block grants for affordable housing activities
label: 4222 Block grants for affordable housing activities
notes: Codification, and , enacted identical sections 802 of . This section is based on the text of , as added by .Pub. L. 106–568, § 203Pub. L. 106–569, § 513Pub. L. 104–330section 802 of Pub. L. 104–330Pub. L. 106–569, § 513

children.heading: Grant authority
children.label: a Grant authority
children.text: For each fiscal year, the Secretary shall (to the extent amounts are made available to carry out this subchapter) make a grant under this subchapter to the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands to carry out affordable housing activities for Native Hawaiian families who are eligible to reside on the Hawaiian Home Lands.

children.label: A
children.text: the Director has submitted to the Secretary a housing plan for that fiscal year; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary has determined under that the housing plan complies with the requirements of .section 4224 of this titlesection 4223 of this title

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: 2 Waiver
children.text: The Secretary may waive the applicability of the requirements under paragraph (1), in part, if the Secretary finds that the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands has not complied or cannot comply with those requirements due to circumstances beyond the control of the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands.

children.heading: Use of funds for affordable housing activities under plan
children.label: c Use of funds for affordable housing activities under plan
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (e), amounts provided under a grant under this section may be used only for affordable housing activities under this subchapter that are consistent with a housing plan approved under .section 4224 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall, by regulation, authorize the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands to use a percentage of any grant amounts received under this subchapter for any reasonable administrative and planning expenses of the Department relating to carrying out this subchapter and activities assisted with those amounts.

children.label: A
children.text: costs for salaries of individuals engaged in administering and managing affordable housing activities assisted with grant amounts provided under this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: expenses incurred in preparing a housing plan under .section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Public-private partnerships
children.label: e Public-private partnerships
children.text: The Director shall make all reasonable efforts, consistent with the purposes of this subchapter, to maximize participation by the private sector, including nonprofit organizations and for-profit entities, in implementing a housing plan that has been approved by the Secretary under .section 4223 of this title
